textDisplay:
@tribalo6806 if you start the movie you don't know , in Dustk Till Dawn I never watch any trailer and was very surprised when the all movie flipped to a vampire movie.
Sometimes it's important to keep the element of surprise intact for the audience.
Imagine watching the Sixth Sense with the knowledge of Bruce Willis being a ghost the all time, this would ruin the movie even know the movie it's about ghost.
New trailers try desperately to attract people to the cinemas but to do they end up showing us the entire movie and all the important plots which is a major mistake.
A good trailer should show a enough to create an interest and not be forgotten without revealing anything about the movie.
Look at Harry Potter And The Sorcerer's Stone trailer who does show a lot but briefly without revealing anything major from the story.
